potential_buyers: Strategic SaaS acquirers and micro-PE roll-ups
valuation_logic: Revenue multiple of 6.30× (1 + recurring×4 + defensibility×3, capped at 10) applied to $240,000 annual revenue ⇒ $1,512,000 estimated value. Sellability 0.63 from documentation, transferability, and defensibility.
steps_to_sellable: Package the data room and approach the buyer shortlist.
